observed_blocker: The deny-first root .dockerignore does not admit the newly versioned v3 provider tool and v3 provider profile, so the literal connected-worker Containerfile build from the exact current head cannot consume its declared COPY inputs.
acceptance_commands: git diff proves exactly two additive allowlist lines in .dockerignore
literal no-cache linux/arm64 build from current versioned Containerfile succeeds

candidate becomes non-null before full parent pre-cut PASS
